_meta.purpose: PAPER TEST ONLY (Stage 3x.3 portability validation). Not a real client. Drafted against the wolfhouse-somo.baseline.json schema to surface where the engine is still surf-house-shaped. NOT used at runtime. See docs/ROADMAP.md § Engine portability.

vertical_profile._note: Lesson/slot vertical. Shared spine reused unchanged; catalog + inventory differ. Closest neighbor of the lodging model because both reserve capacity over time, but the unit is a time-slot seat, not a bed-night.

inventory._note: Replaces lodging beds/rooms. Provider type = 'slots'. Unit = seat in a scheduled lesson slot; availability = slot capacity minus booked seats. Instructor is a constraint, analogous to a room but time-bounded.

instructors._note: Instructor availability constrains slot supply. No equivalent in lodging baseline.

catalog._note: Replaces 'packages'. Generic offerings = lesson types. Priced per seat per session (group) or per session (private).

required_fields._note: Vertical override. Introduces skill_level + participant_count(seats) instead of nights+beds.

confirmation._note: Reused spine section. Should include lesson date/time + meeting point + what to bring instead of check-in/checkout.

cancellation._note: Reused spine section. Weather cancellation is lesson-specific and likely needs its own rule later.

handoff._note: Reused spine section, unchanged across verticals.
handoff.handoff_safe_reply: Let me connect you with our team — they'll be with you shortly.

llm_safety._note: Reused spine section verbatim. Not vertical-specific.

customer_memory_privacy._note: Reused spine section verbatim. Note: minors' data raises extra privacy obligations — flagged for owner.

_portability_findings._note: OUTPUT of the paper test — gaps where the lodging baseline assumes a surf house. Each becomes a Stage 5 extraction backlog item.
required_schema_generalizations: 'rooming' block absent — must be capability-gated, not assumed present.
Availability: lodging = bed-night date overlap; lessons = slot capacity + instructor constraint. Needs InventoryProvider('slots') with a scheduling/instructor concept absent from baseline.
New first-class dimension 'skill_level' has no home in the lodging schema; must live in vertical config + required_fields.
required_fields use participant_count(seats) + date_time(slot), not guest_count(beds) + nights.
confirmation include_* fields assume accommodation; lessons need datetime + meeting point + what-to-bring + weather policy.
Minor/guardian consent + weather cancellation are vertical-specific rules with no baseline slot.
_portability_findings.verdict: Closest vertical to lodging (both reserve time-bounded capacity), yet still ~30% non-reusable, concentrated at catalog + inventory/availability + a new skill_level dimension. Confirms: build InventoryProvider + generic catalog + per-vertical required_fields; spine stays intact.
